---
title: "qPCR Salmonella Host-DNA Depletion Analysis"
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    theme: flatly
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 8
)
```

```{r load libraries}
# Load required libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(rstatix)
library(readr)
library(patchwork)  # For combining plots
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(writexl)
```

# Import and organize data

```{r load data}
# Read the data
data <- read_excel('/Volumes/Alice/1_METHOD_DEVELOPMENT/Host-DNA_depletion/qPCR_Salmonella_host-DNA_depletion/qPCR_Salmonella_host-DNA_depletion.xlsx')

# View structure
glimpse(data)
```

```{r clean data}
# Set detection limits
detection_limit_ct <- 40       # Standard qPCR detection limit
detection_limit_conc <- 0.00001 # Very low concentration

# Clean and structure the data
data_clean <- data %>%
  # Remove rows with all NA values
  filter(!is.na(Name)) %>%
  # FIRST: Rename "No. 3" samples to replicate 4 to match naming pattern
  mutate(
    Name = case_when(
      str_detect(Name, "^No Host-DNA Depletion No\\. 3$") ~ "No Host-DNA Depletion 4",
      str_detect(Name, "^Host-DNA Depletion No\\. 3$") ~ "Host-DNA Depletion 4",
      TRUE ~ Name
    )
  ) %>%
  # Extract sample information from Name column
  mutate(
    # Determine if host depletion was applied
    Treatment = case_when(
      str_detect(Name, "No Host") ~ "Before Depletion",
      str_detect(Name, "Host") & !str_detect(Name, "No Host") ~ "After Depletion",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    ),
    Treatment = factor(Treatment, levels = c("Before Depletion", "After Depletion")),
    # Extract sample type
    Sample_Type = case_when(
      str_detect(Name, "^RVS") ~ "RVS",
      str_detect(Name, "^CAT") ~ "CAT",
      str_detect(Name, "No Host-DNA Depletion No") ~ "Non-Enriched",
      str_detect(Name, "Host-DNA Depletion No") ~ "Non-Enriched",
      str_detect(Name, "No Host-DNA Depletion") ~ "Non-Enriched",
      str_detect(Name, "Host-DNA Depletion") ~ "Non-Enriched",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    ),
    # Extract replicate number - now simplified since we renamed "No. 3" to "4"
    Replicate_ID = case_when(
      # For RVS and CAT, extract number after the sample type
      str_detect(Name, "^RVS") ~ as.numeric(str_extract(Name, "(?<=RVS )\\d+")),
      str_detect(Name, "^CAT") ~ as.numeric(str_extract(Name, "(?<=CAT )\\d+")),
      # For non-enriched, extract the number at the end
      str_detect(Name, "No Host-DNA Depletion \\d+$") ~ 
        as.numeric(str_extract(Name, "\\d+$")),
      str_detect(Name, "Host-DNA Depletion \\d+$") ~ 
        as.numeric(str_extract(Name, "\\d+$")),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    # Handle NEG values - treat as NA
    Ct = ifelse(Ct == "NEG (NTC)" | is.na(Ct), NA, as.numeric(Ct)),
    Concentration = ifelse(is.na(`Calc Conc (ng/ul)`) | `Calc Conc (ng/ul)` == "NEG", 
                          NA, as.numeric(`Calc Conc (ng/ul)`)),
    # Non-detects
    Below_Detection = is.na(Ct) | is.na(Concentration)
  ) %>%
  select(Name, Treatment, Sample_Type, Replicate_ID, Ct, Concentration, Below_Detection)

# Check the extraction worked properly
cat("Non-Enriched sample names and Replicate IDs:\n")
data_clean %>% 
  filter(Sample_Type == "Non-Enriched") %>%
  distinct(Name, Replicate_ID, Treatment) %>%
  arrange(Replicate_ID, Treatment) %>%
  print()

cat("\n")

# View cleaned data summary
data_clean %>% 
  group_by(Sample_Type, Treatment) %>% 
  summarise(
    Total_Measurements = n(),
    Detected = sum(!is.na(Concentration)),
    Non_Detects = sum(is.na(Concentration)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Data Overview by Sample Type and Treatment")
```

```{r prepare summary stats}
# Calculate summary statistics by biological replicate
summary_stats <- data_clean %>%
  group_by(Sample_Type, Treatment, Replicate_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    n_measurements = n(),
    n_detected = sum(!Below_Detection),
    n_non_detect = sum(Below_Detection),
    All_Non_Detect = all(Below_Detection),
    Mean_Ct = ifelse(all(is.na(Ct)), NA_real_, mean(Ct, na.rm = TRUE)),
    SD_Ct = ifelse(all(is.na(Ct)), NA_real_, sd(Ct, na.rm = TRUE)),
    SE_Ct = ifelse(all(is.na(Ct)), NA_real_, SD_Ct / sqrt(sum(!is.na(Ct)))),
    Mean_Conc = ifelse(all(is.na(Concentration)), NA_real_, mean(Concentration, na.rm = TRUE)),
    SD_Conc = ifelse(all(is.na(Concentration)), NA_real_, sd(Concentration, na.rm = TRUE)),
    SE_Conc = ifelse(all(is.na(Concentration)), NA_real_, SD_Conc / sqrt(sum(!is.na(Concentration)))),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Display summary table
summary_stats %>%
  select(Sample_Type, Treatment, Replicate_ID, n_detected, n_non_detect, 
         All_Non_Detect, Mean_Ct, Mean_Conc) %>%
  arrange(Sample_Type, Replicate_ID, Treatment) %>%
  knitr::kable(digits = 4, caption = "Summary Statistics by Biological Replicate")
```

# Non-Enriched Samples - COMBINED PANEL PLOT

```{r non-enriched combined panel plot}
# Prepare non-enriched data for plotting
non_enriched_data <- data_clean %>%
  filter(Sample_Type == "Non-Enriched") %>%
  mutate(
    Ct_plot = ifelse(is.na(Ct), detection_limit_ct, Ct),
    Conc_plot = ifelse(is.na(Concentration), detection_limit_conc, Concentration)
  )

# Define color palette (matching Campylobacter)
color_palette <- c("1" = "#8DB38B", "2" = "#F29E4C", 
                   "3" = "#6279B8", "4" = "#A54657")

# Create long format data for faceting
non_enriched_long <- non_enriched_data %>%
  select(Treatment, Replicate_ID, Below_Detection, Ct_plot, Conc_plot) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Ct_plot, Conc_plot),
    names_to = "Measurement",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Measurement = factor(Measurement,
                        levels = c("Ct_plot", "Conc_plot"),
                        labels = c("Ct Value", 
                                  "DNA Concentration (ng/µL)"))
  )

# Create the combined panel plot
non_enriched_panel <- ggplot(non_enriched_long,
                             aes(x = Treatment, y = Value,
                                 color = as.factor(Replicate_ID),
                                 group = as.factor(Replicate_ID))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2, na.rm = TRUE,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, na.rm = TRUE,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_jitter(alpha = 0.5, 
              width = 0.15, height = 0, size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ Measurement, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y", strip.position = "left") +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_palette,
                     name = "Biological\nReplicate") +
  labs(
    title = expression(paste("Non-Enriched Samples: Host-DNA Depletion Effect on ", italic("Salmonella"))),
    subtitle = "Each point = qPCR technical replicate | Lines connect mean ± SE",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

print(non_enriched_panel)
ggsave("salmonella_non_enriched_combined_panels.png", non_enriched_panel,
       width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 600)
```

# Statistical Analysis - Non-Enriched Samples

```{r stats non-enriched}
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("STATISTICAL ANALYSIS - NON-ENRICHED SALMONELLA\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Prepare paired data
non_enriched_paired <- summary_stats %>%
  filter(Sample_Type == "Non-Enriched") %>%
  select(Replicate_ID, Treatment, Mean_Ct, Mean_Conc, All_Non_Detect) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Treatment, 
              values_from = c(Mean_Ct, Mean_Conc, All_Non_Detect))

cat("Paired Data Structure:\n")
print(non_enriched_paired)
cat("\n")

# Extract before/after vectors
before_conc <- non_enriched_paired$`Mean_Conc_Before Depletion`
after_conc <- non_enriched_paired$`Mean_Conc_After Depletion`
before_ct <- non_enriched_paired$`Mean_Ct_Before Depletion`
after_ct <- non_enriched_paired$`Mean_Ct_After Depletion`

cat("Non-detection status:\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(non_enriched_paired)) {
  cat(sprintf("Replicate %d: Before = %s, After = %s\n",
              non_enriched_paired$Replicate_ID[i],
              ifelse(is.na(before_conc[i]), "ND", "detected"),
              ifelse(is.na(after_conc[i]), "ND", "detected")))
}
cat("\n")

# ============================================================================
# APPROACH 1: EXCLUDE NON-DETECTS (Conservative)
# ============================================================================
cat("========================================\n")
cat("APPROACH 1: Excluding Non-Detects\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

complete_pairs <- !is.na(before_conc) & !is.na(after_conc)
n_complete <- sum(complete_pairs)

cat("Complete pairs (both detected):", n_complete, "\n\n")

if (n_complete >= 2) {
  before_complete <- before_conc[complete_pairs]
  after_complete <- after_conc[complete_pairs]
  
  # Paired t-test
  t_result <- t.test(before_complete, after_complete,
                     paired = TRUE, alternative = "two.sided")
  
  cat("PAIRED T-TEST (excluding non-detects):\n")
  cat("  n pairs:", n_complete, "\n")
  cat("  Mean Before:", round(mean(before_complete), 4), "ng/μL\n")
  cat("  Mean After:", round(mean(after_complete), 4), "ng/μL\n")
  cat("  t-statistic:", round(t_result$statistic, 3), "\n")
  cat("  df:", t_result$parameter, "\n")
  cat("  p-value:", format.pval(t_result$p.value, digits = 4), "\n")
  
  if (t_result$p.value < 0.05) {
    cat("  *** SIGNIFICANT (p < 0.05) ***\n")
  } else if (t_result$p.value < 0.10) {
    cat("  † Trend toward significance (p < 0.10)\n")
  } else {
    cat("  Not significant (p ≥ 0.10)\n")
  }
  
  # Effect size
  differences <- before_complete - after_complete
  cohens_d <- mean(differences) / sd(differences)
  fold_change <- mean(before_complete) / mean(after_complete)
  percent_change <- (mean(differences) / mean(before_complete)) * 100
  
  cat("\nEFFECT SIZE:\n")
  cat("  Fold change:", round(fold_change, 2), "×\n")
  cat("  Percent change:", round(percent_change, 1), "%\n")
  cat("  Cohen's d:", round(cohens_d, 2), "\n\n")
  
  # Wilcoxon test
  w_result <- wilcox.test(before_complete, after_complete,
                          paired = TRUE, alternative = "two.sided")
  cat("WILCOXON SIGNED-RANK TEST:\n")
  cat("  V-statistic:", w_result$statistic, "\n")
  cat("  p-value:", format.pval(w_result$p.value, digits = 4), "\n\n")
} else {
  cat("Insufficient complete pairs for statistical testing.\n\n")
}

# ============================================================================
# APPROACH 2: SIGN TEST
# ============================================================================
cat("========================================\n")
cat("APPROACH 2: Sign Test\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

changes <- rep(NA, length(before_conc))
for (i in 1:length(before_conc)) {
  if (!is.na(before_conc[i]) && !is.na(after_conc[i])) {
    changes[i] <- ifelse(before_conc[i] > after_conc[i], "reduction", 
                        ifelse(after_conc[i] > before_conc[i], "increase", "no change"))
  } else if (!is.na(before_conc[i]) && is.na(after_conc[i])) {
    changes[i] <- "reduction"
  } else if (is.na(before_conc[i]) && !is.na(after_conc[i])) {
    changes[i] <- "increase"
  }
}

cat("Direction of change for each replicate:\n")
for (i in 1:length(changes)) {
  if (!is.na(changes[i])) {
    cat(sprintf("  Replicate %d: %s\n", non_enriched_paired$Replicate_ID[i], changes[i]))
  }
}
cat("\n")

n_reductions <- sum(changes == "reduction", na.rm = TRUE)
n_increases <- sum(changes == "increase", na.rm = TRUE)
n_total <- n_reductions + n_increases

if (n_total > 0) {
  sign_test <- binom.test(n_reductions, n_total, p = 0.5, alternative = "two.sided")
  cat("SIGN TEST RESULTS:\n")
  cat("  Total pairs with change:", n_total, "\n")
  cat("  Reductions:", n_reductions, "\n")
  cat("  Increases:", n_increases, "\n")
  cat("  p-value:", format.pval(sign_test$p.value, digits = 4), "\n\n")
}

cat("\n")
```

# RVS Samples - COMBINED PANEL PLOT

```{r rvs combined panel plot}
# Prepare RVS data for plotting
rvs_data <- data_clean %>%
  filter(Sample_Type == "RVS") %>%
  mutate(
    Ct_plot = ifelse(is.na(Ct), detection_limit_ct, Ct),
    Conc_plot = ifelse(is.na(Concentration), detection_limit_conc, Concentration)
  )

# Define color palette (matching Campylobacter)
color_palette2 <- c("1" = "#966B9D", "2" = "#2A7F62", 
                    "3" = "#9CEAEF")

# Create long format
rvs_long <- rvs_data %>%
  select(Treatment, Replicate_ID, Below_Detection, Ct_plot, Conc_plot) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Ct_plot, Conc_plot),
    names_to = "Measurement",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Measurement = factor(Measurement,
                        levels = c("Ct_plot", "Conc_plot"),
                        labels = c("Ct Value", 
                                  "DNA Concentration (ng/µL)"))
  )

# Create plot
rvs_panel <- ggplot(rvs_long,
                    aes(x = Treatment, y = Value,
                        color = as.factor(Replicate_ID),
                        group = as.factor(Replicate_ID))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2, na.rm = TRUE,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, na.rm = TRUE,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(shape = Below_Detection), alpha = 0.5, 
              width = 0.15, height = 0, size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ Measurement, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y", strip.position = "left") +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_palette2,
                     name = "Biological\nReplicate") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("FALSE" = 16, "TRUE" = 4),
                     labels = c("Detected", "Non-detect"),
                     name = "Detection\nStatus") +
  labs(
    title = expression(paste("RVS Enriched Samples: Host-DNA Depletion Effect on ", italic("Salmonella"))),
    subtitle = "Each point = qPCR technical replicate | × = Non-detect | Lines connect mean ± SE",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

print(rvs_panel)
ggsave("salmonella_rvs_combined_panels.png", rvs_panel,
       width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 600)
```

# Statistical Analysis - RVS Samples

```{r stats rvs}
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("STATISTICAL ANALYSIS - RVS SAMPLES\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Prepare paired data
rvs_paired <- summary_stats %>%
  filter(Sample_Type == "RVS") %>%
  select(Replicate_ID, Treatment, Mean_Ct, Mean_Conc, All_Non_Detect) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Treatment, 
              values_from = c(Mean_Ct, Mean_Conc, All_Non_Detect))

cat("RVS Paired Data:\n")
print(rvs_paired)
cat("\n")

before_conc_rvs <- rvs_paired$`Mean_Conc_Before Depletion`
after_conc_rvs <- rvs_paired$`Mean_Conc_After Depletion`

# Filter complete pairs
complete_pairs_rvs <- !is.na(before_conc_rvs) & !is.na(after_conc_rvs)
n_complete_rvs <- sum(complete_pairs_rvs)

if (n_complete_rvs >= 2) {
  before_complete_rvs <- before_conc_rvs[complete_pairs_rvs]
  after_complete_rvs <- after_conc_rvs[complete_pairs_rvs]
  
  # Choose appropriate test
  if (all(after_complete_rvs == 0)) {
    cat("All 'After' values are 0 (complete depletion)\n")
    cat("Using Wilcoxon signed-rank test\n\n")
    test_rvs <- wilcox.test(before_complete_rvs, after_complete_rvs,
                            paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater")
    test_type <- "Wilcoxon signed-rank"
  } else {
    cat("Using Paired t-test\n\n")
    test_rvs <- t.test(before_complete_rvs, after_complete_rvs,
                      paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater")
    test_type <- "Paired t-test"
  }
  
  cat("TEST RESULTS:\n")
  cat("  Test:", test_type, "\n")
  cat("  n pairs:", n_complete_rvs, "\n")
  cat("  Mean Before:", round(mean(before_complete_rvs), 4), "ng/μL\n")
  cat("  Mean After:", round(mean(after_complete_rvs), 6), "ng/μL\n")
  cat("  p-value:", format.pval(test_rvs$p.value, digits = 4), "\n")
  
  if (test_rvs$p.value < 0.001) {
    cat("  *** HIGHLY SIGNIFICANT (p < 0.001) ***\n")
  } else if (test_rvs$p.value < 0.01) {
    cat("  ** VERY SIGNIFICANT (p < 0.01) **\n")
  } else if (test_rvs$p.value < 0.05) {
    cat("  * SIGNIFICANT (p < 0.05) *\n")
  } else {
    cat("  Not significant\n")
  }
  
  # Effect size
  if (mean(after_complete_rvs) == 0) {
    fold_change_rvs <- Inf
    cat("\n  Fold reduction: Complete (>10,000×)\n")
    cat("  Percent reduction: 100%\n")
  } else {
    fold_change_rvs <- mean(before_complete_rvs) / mean(after_complete_rvs)
    percent_red_rvs <- ((mean(before_complete_rvs) - mean(after_complete_rvs)) / 
                        mean(before_complete_rvs)) * 100
    cat("\n  Fold reduction:", round(fold_change_rvs, 2), "×\n")
    cat("  Percent reduction:", round(percent_red_rvs, 1), "%\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Insufficient complete pairs for RVS statistical testing.\n")
}

cat("\n")
```

# CAT Samples - COMBINED PANEL PLOT

```{r cat combined panel plot}
# Prepare CAT data for plotting
cat_data <- data_clean %>%
  filter(Sample_Type == "CAT") %>%
  mutate(
    Ct_plot = ifelse(is.na(Ct), detection_limit_ct, Ct),
    Conc_plot = ifelse(is.na(Concentration), detection_limit_conc, Concentration)
  )

# Define color palette (matching Campylobacter)
color_palette3 <- c("1" = "#F7934C", "2" = "#417A9F", 
                    "3" = "#68274A")

# Create long format
cat_long <- cat_data %>%
  select(Treatment, Replicate_ID, Below_Detection, Ct_plot, Conc_plot) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Ct_plot, Conc_plot),
    names_to = "Measurement",
    values_to = "Value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Measurement = factor(Measurement,
                        levels = c("Ct_plot", "Conc_plot"),
                        labels = c("Ct Value", 
                                  "DNA Concentration (ng/µL)"))
  )

# Create plot
cat_panel <- ggplot(cat_long,
                    aes(x = Treatment, y = Value,
                        color = as.factor(Replicate_ID),
                        group = as.factor(Replicate_ID))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2, na.rm = TRUE,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, na.rm = TRUE,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", 
               width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_jitter(alpha = 0.5, 
              width = 0.15, height = 0, size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ Measurement, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y", strip.position = "left") +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_palette3,
                     name = "Biological\nReplicate") +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 8) +
  labs(
    title = expression(paste("CAT Enriched Samples: Host-DNA Depletion Effect on ", italic("Salmonella"))),
    subtitle = "Each point = qPCR technical replicate | Lines connect mean ± SE",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

print(cat_panel)
ggsave("salmonella_cat_combined_panels.png", cat_panel,
       width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 600)
```

# Statistical Analysis - CAT Samples

```{r stats cat}
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("STATISTICAL ANALYSIS - CAT SAMPLES\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Prepare paired data
cat_paired <- summary_stats %>%
  filter(Sample_Type == "CAT") %>%
  select(Replicate_ID, Treatment, Mean_Ct, Mean_Conc, All_Non_Detect) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Treatment, 
              values_from = c(Mean_Ct, Mean_Conc, All_Non_Detect))

cat("CAT Paired Data:\n")
print(cat_paired)
cat("\n")

before_conc_cat <- cat_paired$`Mean_Conc_Before Depletion`
after_conc_cat <- cat_paired$`Mean_Conc_After Depletion`

# Filter complete pairs
complete_pairs_cat <- !is.na(before_conc_cat) & !is.na(after_conc_cat)
n_complete_cat <- sum(complete_pairs_cat)

if (n_complete_cat >= 2) {
  before_complete_cat <- before_conc_cat[complete_pairs_cat]
  after_complete_cat <- after_conc_cat[complete_pairs_cat]
  
  # Paired t-test
  cat("Using Paired t-test\n\n")
  test_cat <- t.test(before_complete_cat, after_complete_cat,
                    paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater")
  
  cat("TEST RESULTS:\n")
  cat("  Test: Paired t-test\n")
  cat("  n pairs:", n_complete_cat, "\n")
  cat("  Mean Before:", round(mean(before_complete_cat), 4), "ng/μL\n")
  cat("  Mean After:", round(mean(after_complete_cat), 4), "ng/μL\n")
  cat("  t-statistic:", round(test_cat$statistic, 3), "\n")
  cat("  p-value:", format.pval(test_cat$p.value, digits = 4), "\n")
  
  if (test_cat$p.value < 0.001) {
    cat("  *** HIGHLY SIGNIFICANT (p < 0.001) ***\n")
  } else if (test_cat$p.value < 0.01) {
    cat("  ** VERY SIGNIFICANT (p < 0.01) **\n")
  } else if (test_cat$p.value < 0.05) {
    cat("  * SIGNIFICANT (p < 0.05) *\n")
  } else {
    cat("  Not significant\n")
  }
  
  # Effect size
  fold_change_cat <- mean(before_complete_cat) / mean(after_complete_cat)
  percent_red_cat <- ((mean(before_complete_cat) - mean(after_complete_cat)) / 
                      mean(before_complete_cat)) * 100
  cat("\n  Fold reduction:", round(fold_change_cat, 2), "×\n")
  cat("  Percent reduction:", round(percent_red_cat, 1), "%\n")
} else {
  cat("Insufficient complete pairs for CAT statistical testing.\n")
}

cat("\n")
```

# Summary Report

```{r summary table}
cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("FINAL SUMMARY\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

# Create comprehensive summary table
final_summary <- summary_stats %>%
  group_by(Sample_Type, Treatment) %>%
  summarise(
    n_bio_reps = n(),
    n_detected = sum(!All_Non_Detect),
    n_complete_ND = sum(All_Non_Detect, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mean_Ct = mean(Mean_Ct, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mean_Conc = mean(Mean_Conc, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 4)))

print(final_summary)

cat("\nAll plots saved as PNG files in working directory.\n\n")
cat("Key features of this analysis:\n")
cat("1. Combined panel plots showing Ct + Concentration together\n")
cat("2. Consistent color schemes matching Campylobacter analysis\n")
cat("3. Appropriate statistical tests for each sample type\n")
cat("4. Lines connecting means for each biological replicate\n")
cat("5. Clear marking of non-detects with × symbols\n")
cat("6. Italicized organism names in titles\n\n")

sessionInfo()
```

# Export Results

```{r export-results}
# Prepare summary results table
summary_results <- tibble(
  Sample_Type = character(),
  N_Pairs = numeric(),
  Test_Type = character(),
  Mean_Before = numeric(),
  Mean_After = numeric(),
  P_Value = character()
)

# Add results if available
if (exists("n_complete") && n_complete >= 2) {
  summary_results <- add_row(summary_results,
    Sample_Type = "Non-Enriched",
    N_Pairs = n_complete,
    Test_Type = "Paired t-test",
    Mean_Before = round(mean(before_complete), 4),
    Mean_After = round(mean(after_complete), 4),
    P_Value = format.pval(t_result$p.value, digits = 4)
  )
}

if (exists("n_complete_rvs") && n_complete_rvs >= 2) {
  summary_results <- add_row(summary_results,
    Sample_Type = "RVS",
    N_Pairs = n_complete_rvs,
    Test_Type = ifelse(all(after_complete_rvs == 0), "Wilcoxon", "Paired t-test"),
    Mean_Before = round(mean(before_complete_rvs), 4),
    Mean_After = round(mean(after_complete_rvs), 6),
    P_Value = format.pval(test_rvs$p.value, digits = 4)
  )
}

if (exists("n_complete_cat") && n_complete_cat >= 2) {
  summary_results <- add_row(summary_results,
    Sample_Type = "CAT",
    N_Pairs = n_complete_cat,
    Test_Type = "Paired t-test",
    Mean_Before = round(mean(before_complete_cat), 4),
    Mean_After = round(mean(after_complete_cat), 4),
    P_Value = format.pval(test_cat$p.value, digits = 4)
  )
}

# Export to Excel
if (nrow(summary_results) > 0) {
  excel_data <- list(
    "Summary" = summary_results,
    "All_Summary_Stats" = summary_stats,
    "Raw_Data" = data_clean
  )
  
  write_xlsx(excel_data, "Salmonella_qPCR_Results.xlsx")
  cat("\n✓ Excel file generated: 'Salmonella_qPCR_Results.xlsx'\n\n")
}

# Print summary table
if (nrow(summary_results) > 0) {
  knitr::kable(summary_results,
               col.names = c("Sample Type", "N Pairs", "Test", "Before (ng/μL)", 
                            "After (ng/μL)", "p-value"),
               caption = "Statistical Summary: Host-DNA Depletion Across All Sample Types")
}
```
